CustomField.description: Agency win rate percentage for the sector-circuit combination derived from PermitTEC v0.1 litigation corpus (Stage 13 matrix). Set by NEPA_Challenge_Predictor or NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer when a matching NEPA_Sector_Circuit_Risk__mdt record exists.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Historical agency win rate for this project's sector and judicial circuit combination. Lower values indicate higher litigation risk.
CustomField.label: Sector-Circuit Win Rate (%)
